zh.lifeSummary: 當Lora Peverel於1254年出生在英國戴文桑普福德 培維勒爾時，她的父親Hugh Peverell31歲，母親Isabel FitzWilliam35歲。她和William de Raleigh III至少有1個兒子。她去世於1326年在英國享年72歲。

nameMeanings.name: Peverel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Peverall
meanings: Norman, English: relationship name from Old French Peurel (Latin Piperellus), a diminutive of Old French pevre ‘pepper’ (Anglo-Norman French peivere, Latin piper), originally perhaps used as a nickname on the Continent but used as a personal name in Anglo-Norman England.

nameMeanings.name: Lora
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably a respelling of   Laura  , that coincides in form with the German spelling of the same name and also with the medieval English given name.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Lora Peverel was born in 1254, in Sampford Peverell, Devon, England, her father, Hugh Peverell, was 31 and her mother, Isabel FitzWilliam, was 35. She had at least 1 son with William de Raleigh III. She died in 1326, in England, at the age of 72.

ja.lifeSummary: Lora Peverelが1254年にイギリスデボンサンプフォード ペバーエルで生まれた時，父Hugh Peverellは31歳，母Isabel FitzWilliamは35歳であった。彼女はWilliam de Raleigh IIIとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1326年にイギリスで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lora Peverel(이)가 1254년 영국 데폰 샘p퍼드 p에버에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh Peverell(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel FitzWilliam(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 William de Raleigh III(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1326년 영국에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.
